Stars.Requirements:
((|@Jumpdive distance| or |@WK| or (|!obscure| and |@Forward jump|)) 
 AND (|@WK| or (|!reasonable| and |@DJLG height|)) 
 AND (|Jump| or |Long Jump| or (|Sideflip| and (|Dive| or |!hard|))))
 OR (|!obscure| and |@C1 mountain| and (|Dive| or |Long Jump|))
Stars.Comment: I went a bit overboard with the logic here, but that's because this is the perfect star to plando the C5 ticket in and guarantee that you'll find it reasonably early

Stars.Requirements: (|Long Jump| and |@JGP height|) or (|!reasonable| and (|Long Jump| or |@JGP height|))
Stars.Comment: Reasonable: Twirl to either the island secret or the star, but not both

Stars.Requirements: |@C1 mountain| AND (|@SB near wall| or (|!hard| and |!Bomb Clips| and |Punch| and |Jump|)) AND |Shell| AND (|@Jump height| or |@WK|)
(|@C1 mountain| and (|Jump| or |Long Jump| or (|!reasonable| and |Sideflip|))) OR (|!hard| and |@WK|)
Stars.Comment: Hard: Tap the dpad, backflip wallkick up the last 2 pillars, good straining will get you enough height
Hard: Twirl from the spindrift past the domino

Stars.Requirements: |Jump| or |Sideflip| or (|Long Jump| and |Wallkick|) or (|!obscure| and |Backflip| and |Wallkick|)
|@Any jump| and (|@Forward jump| or (|!obscure| and (|@WK| or |Dive|)))

Stars.Comment: cba ranking backflip+longjump harder than strict

Stars.Requirements: (|@Forward jump| or (|!hard| and |Backflip| and (|Dive| or |@WK|))) AND (|@Jump height| or |!reasonable|)
|Shell| AND (|Long Jump| or (|!reasonable| and |@SFdive distance|) or (|!hard| and |Jump|)) AND (|@Jump height| or (|!reasonable| and |@WK|))
(|@Forward jump| and |@WK|) or |@DJLG height| or (|Wallkick| and |!hard|)
(|@UB near wall| and |@Any jump|) OR (|@Corner bomb clip| and |@Forward jump|) OR (|!Bomb Clips| and |Jump| and |Punch|)
(|@Any jump| or |Dive| or |Kick| or |Punch| or |Slidekick|) AND (|@GP near wall| or |!reasonable|)
Stars.Comment: I don't think you get 80c with just the gp on the coin switch, need an attack too

Stars.Requirements: ((|Long Jump| or (|!reasonable| and |Double Jump| and (|Dive| or |Kick|))) and (|@Jump height| or |@WK|)) OR (|!obscure| and |@C4 high lava| and |@Forward jump|)
Stars.Comment: This logic used to be "Jump or Long Jump". Neither works without raising the lava.

Stars.Requirements: |@Forward jump| and |@C4 default lava| and (|@Jump height| or |!reasonable|)
|@UB near wall| OR (|@C4 high lava| and |@Corner bomb clip|)
|Jump| or |Sideflip| or (|Long Jump| and (|Wallkick| or |Backflip|)) or (|!obscure| and |Backflip|)

Stars.Comment: nah crouch quickturning to line up the backflips on keyboard is not something a casual would find

Stars.Requirements: ((|Long Jump| or (|Triple Jump| and |Dive|)) and (|@Jump height| or |@WK|)) OR (|!reasonable| and (|Long Jump| or |Double Jump| or (|Jump| and (|Kick| or |Dive| or (|!obscure| and |@WK|))) or (|Sideflip| and (|Dive| or |Wallkick| or |!obscure|))))
(|Jump| and |Kick|) or |Long Jump| or (|!hard| and |@SFdive distance|)
(|Double Jump| or |!reasonable|) and (|@Forward jump| or (|!obscure| and |Wallkick| and (|Slidekick| or |Dive| or |Backflip|)) or (|!hard| and |Backflip|))

(|@SB| and (|@Jumpdive distance| or (|!reasonable| and |@Forward jump|)) and |@Jump height|) OR (|!obscure| and |@SB| and |@WK| and |Dive|) OR (|@C6 light chuckya| and |Jump|) OR (|!BLJs| and |!hard| and |Long Jump|)

(|Long Jump| or (|!reasonable| and |Double Jump| and (|Kick| or |Dive|)) or (|!obscure| and |@Forward jump|))
 AND (|Jump| or (|!reasonable| and |Long Jump|))
 AND (|Shell| or |!reasonable|)
 AND (|Long Jump| or (|!obscure| and (|Double Jump| or (|Jump| and |Kick|) or |Backflip|)))
 AND (|@Jump height| or |@WK|)
(|Long Jump| and |Jump| and |Shell|) or (|!reasonable| and |@Any jump|)
Stars.Comment: No need to list out obscure ways to get the shell when swimming jumps are reasonable anyway

Stars.Requirements: (|@UB near wall| or (|!hard| and |@C6 light chuckya| and |Jump|) or (|!hard| and |!Bomb Clips| and |Punch| and |Jump| and |Dive|)) AND (|@Jumpdive distance| and (|Long Jump| or |Double Jump| or |!hard|))
|@SB near wall| or (|@C6 light chuckya| and |Jump|)
(|@Any jump| or (|Dive| and |!obscure|) or (|Punch| and |!hard|)) AND (|@GP near wall| or |!reasonable|)

((|@WK| and (|Sideflip| or |!reasonable|)) or (|!reasonable| and |@C7 flight|) or (|!reasonable| and |Double Jump| and |Kick|) or (|!hard| and |@Forward jump| and |Dive|)) AND (|Double Jump| or |Sideflip| or |@WK| or (|!reasonable| and |Jump| and (|Kick| or |Dive|)))
|@C7 roof| AND (|Jump| or |Long Jump| or (|!reasonable| and |@Rollout height|))
(|@SB near wall| and (|Long Jump| or (|!hard| and |Triple Jump| and |Dive|))) or |@C7 flight|
|@C7 flight| or (|!hard| and |@SB near wall| and |Long Jump| and |@WK|)
(|Vanish Cap| and |@Any jump|) or (|!hard| and |!Bomb Walking| and |Punch| and |Jump|)

(|@UB| and (|Long Jump| or |@C7 flight|)) OR (|@C7 roof| and (|@Any jump| or (|Ground Pound| and |@Rollout height|))) OR (|!reasonable| and (|Jump| or |Sideflip|)) OR (|!obscure| and |@Rollout height|)
Stars.Comment: Used to just be "rollout height" but there are only 85 non-Lakitu coins available over a pretty large area, most of them from enemies

Stars.Requirements: (|@DJLG height| or |@WK|) AND (|Long Jump| or (|!reasonable| and |@Forward jump|)) AND |@Jump height|
(|Wing Cap| and |Triple Jump|) or (|!hard| and |Wallkick| and (|Long Jump| or |Double Jump|) and |Jump| and |Kick| and (|Long Jump| or |Slidekick|))

Stars.Comment: Either chuckya lottery or falling from the mountain

Stars.Requirements: (|@UB| and |Shell| and (|@DJLG height| or (|!reasonable| and |Jump|))) OR (|!hard| and |@C9 spawn| and (|Jump| or |Sideflip|))

(|Long Jump| and (|@Jump height| or |!reasonable|))
 OR (|Double Jump| and (|Kick| or |Dive|))
 OR (|!obscure| and |@WK| and (|Jump| or |Sideflip|))

(|Jump| or (|Long Jump| and |!reasonable|) or (|Sideflip| and |!obscure|))
 AND (|@JGP height| or (|!reasonable| and |Jump| and |Kick|))

Stars.Comment: Same logic as before, just restructured

Stars.Requirements:
|@UB| AND 
 (|Long Jump|
 OR (|Double Jump| and (|Kick| or |Dive|))
 OR (|!obscure| and |@WK| and (|Jump| or |Sideflip|)))

(|Long Jump| and (|@WK| or (|!reasonable| and |@Jump height|)))
 OR (|!reasonable| and |Jump| and (|@WK| or |Kick| or |!obscure|))
 OR (|!obscure| and |Sideflip| and (|@WK| or |Dive| or |!hard|))
 OR (|!hard| and |Wallkick|)
Stars.Comment: A jump-by-jump breakdown of the logic would get way too complex, so instead I wrote down each solution explicitly
Sure, make jump+wallkick reasonable. Backflip+wallkick is reasonable too

Stars.Requirements:
(|Long Jump| or (|!reasonable| and |@Forward jump|) or |!obscure|)
 AND (|@Jump height| or (|!obscure| and |Long Jump|))

(|@WK| or |Triple Jump| or |Sideflip| or (|!reasonable| and |Double Jump|)) 
 AND (|Long Jump| or (|!reasonable| and (|Double Jump| or |Sideflip|)) or |!obscure|)

Stars.Comment: Hard: Sideflip WK chain from star 3 path

Stars.Requirements:
|@WK|
 AND (|Long Jump| or (|Jump| and |Kick|) or |!obscure|)
 AND |@Forward jump|
 AND (|Jump| or (|!reasonable| and |Kick|) or |!obscure|)

(|@Jumpdive distance| or (|!obscure| and |Double Jump|))
 AND (|@WK| or |!hard|)
 AND (|Long Jump| or (|!reasonable| and |Double Jump|) or |!obscure|)
 AND (|@DJLG height| or (|!reasonable| and |@WK|) or |!hard|)
Stars.Comment:
No WK: 2 lavabounces from the domino to the blue switch
No LJ: 2 lavabounces to skip the box switch
No DJLG height: Get the red, then lavabounce to the top
No WK or jump height: Get tossed

Stars.Requirements:
|@C12 back area|
 AND |@WK|
 AND (|@Jump height| or |!reasonable|)

|@WK|
 and (|Long Jump| or (|!reasonable| and |Double Jump|) or |!obscure|)
 and (|Course 12 Cannon| or (|!obscure| and |Long Jump|))
 and |@Jumpdive distance|
 and (|Sideflip| or (|!reasonable| and |Backflip|) or (|!obscure| and |Double Jump|))
Stars.Comment:
No LJ: 2 lavabounces to skip the box switch
No cannon: Longjump from star 2

Stars.Requirements:
|@C12 left path|
 and (|@WK| or (|!reasonable| and (|Long Jump| or |Kick| or |Double Jump|)) or |!hard|)
 and (|@Jump height| or |@WK|)

|@C12 left path| and |Vanish Cap|
 and (|@DJLG height| or (|!obscure| and |@WK|))

|@C12 back area|
 AND (|Course 12 Cannon| or |!obscure|)
 AND (|@UB near wall| or (|!hard| and |!Chuckya Clips| and |Punch| and |Jump|))

Stars.Comment: I'm not sure what exactly is obscure without doublejump/sideflip here...

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| and (|Long Jump| or (|!obscure| and |Jump|) or (|!hard| and |Sideflip|))

((|Sideflip| or |Triple Jump| or (|!obscure| and |Double Jump|) or |@WK|)
 and |@SFdive distance|)
 or (|!reasonable| and |Jump| and |Kick|)
 or (|!reasonable| and |Triple Jump|)

|@Jump height| and |Vanish Cap|
 and (|Dive| or |Long Jump| or |!obscure|)
 and (|@JGP height| or |@WK|) and |Shell|

((|Vanish Cap| and |@Jump height|) or (|!Bomb Clips| and |Punch| and |Jump|))
 and |@Jumpdive distance|

(|@UB| and (|Long Jump| or (|!reasonable| and |Jump|)))
 or (|!reasonable| and |Triple Jump| and (|Dive| or |Kick| or |!obscure|))
 or (|!obscure| and |Jump| and |Kick|)
 or (|!hard| and |Jump| and |Dive|)

Troll Star.Requirements:
(|@UB| and (|Long Jump| or (|!reasonable| and |Jump|)))
 or (|!reasonable| and |Triple Jump| and (|Dive| or |Kick| or |!obscure|))
 or (|!obscure| and |Jump| and |Kick|)
 or (|!hard| and |Jump| and |Dive|)

Stars.Requirements:
(|Triple Jump|
  or (|!reasonable| and |Jump| and |Dive|)
  or (|!hard| and (|Jump| or |Long Jump|) and |@WK|))
 AND |@JGP height|

|@Forward jump|
 and (|Vanish Cap| or (|!Bomb Clips| and |!hard| and |Punch| and |Jump|))
 and (|@JGP height| or |@WK|)

((|Course 14 Cannon| and |Long Jump|)
  or (|!obscure| and |Triple Jump| and |@WK|)
  or (|!hard| and |@DJLG height| and |@WK|))
 and (|@JGP height| or (|!obscure| and |@WK|))
Stars.Comment: Hard: Wallkick on the lantern to the second-last bumper

Stars.Requirements:
(|@UB near wall|
 and (|@DJLG height| or |@WK| or |Backflip| or |!obscure|)
 and (|Long Jump| or (|!reasonable| and |Kick| and |Jump|)))
 or (|!obscure| and |!Bomb Walking| and |@DJLG height|)

|@Scriosadh| and |@Forward jump|
 and (|@GP| or (|!hard| and |Slidekick|))
 and (|Dive| or |!reasonable|)
(|Wallkick| or |!reasonable|) and (|Sideflip| or |Jump| or (|!hard| and |Long Jump|))

|Ground Pound|
 and (|Jump| or |Sideflip|
  or (|Backflip| and (|Long Jump| or (|!obscure| and |Wallkick|))))

(|Jump| and (|Kick| or |Long Jump|))
 or (|Long Jump| and (|@Jump height| or |!obscure|))
 or (|Sideflip| and |Dive|)

|@SST| and (|Kick| or |Punch| or |Dive| or (|Jump| and |!reasonable|))
 and |@JGP height|

Macros.WK: |Wallkick| and (|Jump| or |Long Jump| or |Sideflip| or (|!reasonable| and |Backflip|))
Macros.Miko: |@DJLG height| and ((|Jump| and |Kick|) or (|!reasonable| and |Long Jump|))
Macros.Eientei: (|@Forward jump| AND (|@DJLG height| or (|!obscure| and |@WK|))) AND (|Long Jump| or |Dive| or |!reasonable|) AND |Shell|
Macros.Scriosadh: |@GP| or (|!reasonable| and (|Slidekick| or |Dive|)) or (|!obscure| and (|Kick| or |Punch|))
Macros.C9 fort: |@C9 spawn| and (|@WK| and (|Triple Jump| or (|!reasonable| and |Double Jump|)))
Macros.Bullgetsu: (|Jump| and (|Kick| or |!reasonable|)) or (|!reasonable| and |Sideflip|) or (|!hard| and |Long Jump|)
Macros.C9 Mountain: ((|Long Jump| and |Wallkick| and |!reasonable|) or |Triple Jump| or (|Jump| and (|Kick| or |Course 9 Cannon|) and |Wallkick| and |!reasonable|) or (|Sideflip| and (|Dive| or |Course 9 Cannon|)))
Macros.Jumpdive distance: |Long Jump| or (|Jump| and (|Kick| or |Dive|) and (|Double Jump| or |!reasonable|))
Macros.Junko: |@WK| AND |@Forward jump| AND (|@DJLG height| or (|!reasonable| and |Jump|) or (|!hard| and |Long Jump|)) AND (|Long Jump| or |!reasonable|) AND (|Vanish Cap| or (|!reasonable| and |Triple Jump| and |Dive|) or (|!obscure| and |Long Jump|)) AND (|Long Jump| or (|Double Jump| and (|Kick| or |Dive|)) or |!hard|)
Macros.SST: (|Jump| or |Long Jump| or (|!reasonable| and |Sideflip|)) and |@WK| and (|@DJLG height| or |!reasonable|) and |Shell|
Macros.OW Reds: |@WK| and (|Long Jump| or (|!reasonable| and |Double Jump| and (|Kick| or |Dive|))) and (|@DJLG height| or |!obscure|)
Macros.GP near wall: |Ground Pound| and (|Jump| or |Backflip| or |Sideflip| or (|Long Jump| and |Wallkick|))
Macros.C1 mountain: |@C1 domino| AND (|@DJLG height| or |Backflip| or (|!reasonable| and |@WK|))
Macros.JGP height: |Double Jump| or |Sideflip| or |Backflip| or (|Jump| and |Ground Pound|)
Macros.C1 domino: |@Forward jump| or (|!obscure| and |Slidekick|) or (|!hard| and (|Dive| or |Backflip|))
Macros.SFdive distance: |Long Jump| or (|Jump| and (|Kick| or |Dive|)) or (|!reasonable| and |Double Jump|) or (|!obscure| and |Sideflip| and |Dive|)
Macros.C4 high lava: (|@SB near wall| or (|!obscure| and |@Corner bomb clip|)) and |@Forward jump|
Macros.C6 light chuckya: |!Chuckya Clips| and |!obscure| and |@Forward jump| and |Punch| and |Jump|
Macros.C7 flight: |Wing Cap| and |@Jump height| and (|Triple Jump| or |Course 7 Cannon|)
Macros.C7 roof: ((|@Rollout height| and |Course 7 Cannon|) or (|!reasonable| and |@C7 flight|) or (|!reasonable| and |@WK| and |@Jump height|))
Macros.C9 spawn: ((|@Jumpdive distance| or (|!obscure| and |Double Jump|) or (|!obscure| and |Backflip| and |Dive|)) and (|@DJLG height| or |@WK|)) or (|!reasonable| and |Course 9 Cannon|)
Macros.C11 left side: ((|@DJLG height| or |@WK|) and (|@Forward jump| or |!reasonable|)) OR (|!obscure| and |@Any jump|)
Macros.C12 left path: (|@Jumpdive distance| or (|!obscure| and |Double Jump|)) and (|Jump| or |!reasonable|)
Macros.C12 back area: (|Long Jump| or (|Triple Jump| and |Dive|) or (|!obscure| and |@C12 left path|)) and (|@DJLG height| or |@WK|)

Entrances: |Overworld Cannon| and (|Long Jump| or (|!obscure| and (|Jump| or |Sideflip| or (|Backflip| and |Wallkick|) or |Dive| or |Slidekick|)))
|Key 2| and |@C1 mountain| and |@WK| and (|Long Jump| or (|!reasonable| and |Double Jump| and |Kick|) or (|!obscure| and |Triple Jump| and |Dive|))
(|@Forward jump| or (|!reasonable| and |@WK|)) and (|@Jump height| or |!reasonable|)
|@SB| or (|!Major Skips| and |!Chuckya Clips| and |Punch| and |@Any jump|)
(|Key 1| and (|@Any jump| or (|!hard| and |Wallkick|))) or (|!Bomb Walking| and |!Major Skips| and |Jump| and |Punch|)
|Course 8 Cannon| OR (|!Major Skips| and (|@WK| and (|Jump| or |Sideflip|)) or |Long Jump| or (|!obscure| and |@Jump height|))
|@C12 left path| and (|Stars:60| or (|!hard| and |!Major Skips| and |!Chuckya Clips| and |Punch| and |Dive| and |Jump|))
(|Vanish Cap| and |@Jump height|) or (|!hard| and |!Major Skips| and |!Bomb Clips| and |Jump| and |Punch|)
|Long Jump| or |Jump| or (|!obscure| and |@WK| and (|Dive| or |!hard|))
|Long Jump| or |Triple Jump| or (|Double Jump| and |Kick|)
|Metal Cap| and |@Jumpdive distance| and (|@Jump height| or (|!hard| and |Long Jump|))
(|Jump| and (|Kick| or |Long Jump|)) or (|Long Jump| and (|@Jump height| or |!obscure|)) or (|Sideflip| and |Dive|)
